Duelist Glove.name: Duelist Glove
Duelist Glove.description: Gain +10% damage per consecutive hit. Resets on miss or taking damage.

Hidden Blade.name: Hidden Blade
Hidden Blade.description: +10% damage per negative status on the target.

Woodcutter's Bandana.name: Woodcutter's Bandana
Woodcutter's Bandana.description: Once per battle, a killing blow instead leaves you at 1 HP.

Resonant Badge.name: Resonant Badge
Resonant Badge.description: +25% damage when attacking with your current Element.

Prayer Bead.name: Prayer Bead
Prayer Bead.description: Recover 1 MP at the start of each turn. Stacks with additional beads.

Lifespark Crystal.name: Lifespark Crystal
Lifespark Crystal.description: Shatters automatically when the bearer falls, reviving them with 50% HP. Each crystal grants one revival.

Gorgon Eye.name: Gorgon Eye
Gorgon Eye.description: At the start of battle, automatically cast Gorgon Eye on a random enemy.

Backpack.name: Backpack
Backpack.description: After each battle, scavenge a random item.
